context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the er-schema-cardinality scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Uses ER diagram
checklist.description: Uses Mermaid erDiagram syntax rather than a flowchart or class diagram.

checklist.name: Models all entities
checklist.description: Includes User, Diagram, and Review entities with clear names.

checklist.name: Correct cardinality
checklist.description: Represents User-to-Diagram as one-to-many, Diagram-to-Review as zero-or-more reviews, and each Review belonging to one User and one Diagram.

checklist.name: Assumptions note
checklist.description: Briefly states any assumptions without inventing unnecessary fields.
